features.description: Extract (listfile) and (attributes) alongside regular named files
LZMA read/write parity enabled in default build profile

features.evidence: src/compression/mod.rs + src/compression/huffman.rs + src/compression/adpcm.rs + src/compression/sparse.rs + tests/compression_codec_vectors.rs (golden-vector encode/decode parity)

features.description: Create/add/update output layout parity versus StormLib
features.evidence: src/file/add.rs + src/archive/attributes.rs + src/internal/file_table.rs + src/compression/mod.rs + tests/writer_equivalence_parity.rs (byte-for-byte archive equality)

features.description: Full (attributes) compatibility in read/write and extraction flows
features.evidence: src/archive/attributes.rs + src/file/add.rs + tests/attributes_patch.rs + tests/attributes_full_compat_parity.rs (StormLib fixture read parity + sync/write coverage)

features.description: Open/apply patch archives with StormLib-compatible precedence behavior
features.evidence: src/archive/patch.rs + src/archive/patch_apply.rs + tests/patch_chain_parity.rs (explicit+auto prefix handling, fallback, and last-patch precedence)
src/archive/verify.rs + tests/verify_raw_full_parity.rs + existing verify unit tests (header/het/bet/hash/block/hiblock/file target behavior and edge-case parity coverage)
src/file/read.rs + src/internal/file_table.rs + src/file/list.rs + src/file/callbacks.rs (locale APIs plus list/add/compact callback surface)
